name: M10 - Business Hours Router & After-Hours Handler

parameters.responseBody: ={"route": "after-hours", "isOpen": false, "message": "Thank you for reaching out to [SHOP NAME]! We're currently closed but will get back to you when we open at {{ $json.nextOpenTime }}. Your message has been saved and our team will respond first thing! 🕐", "messageAr": "شكراً لتواصلك مع [SHOP NAME]! نحن حالياً مغلقين لكن سنرد عليك لما نفتح الساعة {{ $json.nextOpenTime }}. رسالتك محفوظة عندنا وفريقنا بيتواصل معاك أول ما نفتح! 🕐"}
